name: gantt-timeline-01
title: Gantt Timeline 01
author: ilinxa
description: Editable project timeline (Gantt) over the canonical TodoItem[] — one bar per task from effective start→end, collapsible WBS summary rows from children, milestone diamonds, a continuous-zoom two-tier axis (hour→quarter), today line, filled status/urgency bars (ramp imported from todo-rich-card), and a pan/swipe/zoom canvas with momentum + pinch. v0.2 adds drag-to-reschedule, edge-resize, draw-to-create, delete, inline rename, gutter reparent (DnD), detail editing via the embedded todo-rich-card, and the shared TodoPermissions matrix — all opt-in behind `editable` (default off = byte-identical v1 read-only); edits fire todo-rich-card-shaped events + onChange(TodoItem[]). v0.3 adds group-move: drag a WBS summary bracket to rigidly shift its whole subtree (atomic permission; per-leaf events + one onChange). v0.4 adds a Draw-mode toggle: the gesture pipeline defers intent to the first move (click selects, vertical drag scrolls), so empty-row drag pans by default and draws a new task only when Draw is on — ending the draw-vs-pan conflict; the right-click menu's portaled events no longer leak back into the canvas. Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <GanttTimeline01> plus a headless <GanttTimelineRoot> + flat à-la-carte parts (Toolbar / Axis / Gutter / Body) + Tier-C primitives, so dropping the toolbar or hand-assembling a subset works. The full-card tooltip and the edit editor lazy-load todo-rich-card, keeping it out of the default bundle.
